prompt: A highly detailed professional studio photograph of a confident and smiling Caucasian businessman in his early 30s with short well-groomed brown hair and a neat beardHe is captured from the waist up standing directly in front of a solid clean pastel light-green studio backgroundThe man is wearing a perfectly tailored modern dark charcoal grey suit jacket with matching suit trousersHe wears a crisp and pristine white button-down dress shirt and a solid satin royal blue necktie neatly knottedA folded white pocket square peeks subtly out of his breast pocketHe is looking directly at the camera with warm engaged eyes and a bright trustworthy smile that shows his teethIn his left hand he holds up a modern black smartphone facing forwardThe phone displays colorful business data analytics charts bar graphs and infographic diagrams on its screenWith his right hand he is giving a confident thumbs-up gesture next to the phoneThe lighting is soft even and professional characteristic of corporate commercial advertising photographyThis lighting creates gentle highlights on his face and suit while casting no harsh shadowsEvery texture is crisp and clear from the fine fabric of the wool suit to the smooth glass of the mobile phone screenThe overall composition is perfectly centered balanced and cleanIt effectively conveys success financial growth and modern business technologyThe image has a sharp focus throughout high contrast and vivid colorsIt looks like it was shot with a high-end DSLR camera and a premium portrait lensThis delivery provides a premium stock photo aestheticThe background color provides excellent contrast against his dark suitThe subject appears approachable professional and highly skilledThis makes the visual ideal for corporate marketing materials and business websites
